title: Prepared statement with wrd arg type cannot be used
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT count() FROM test_table HAVING count() > 0;
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Prepared statement with wrong argument type
